languages.text: Единственный вход в лабораторию, где покоится Нунциус — старый подъемник. Нужно активировать его.
Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.
languages.original_text: Единственный вход в лабораторию, где покоится Нунциус — старый подъемник. Нужно активировать его.

traits.locale_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.
Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.
Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

languages.text: Aktiviere den alten Aufzug. Er ist der einzige Weg in das Labor, in dem Nuncius' Leichnam liegt.
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

traits.locale_text: Aktiviere den alten Aufzug. Er ist der einzige Weg in das Labor, in dem Nuncius' Leichnam liegt.

languages.text: Activez l'ancien ascenseur. Lui seul vous permettra d'atteindre le laboratoire où repose la dépouille de Nuncius.
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

traits.locale_text: Activez l'ancien ascenseur. Lui seul vous permettra d'atteindre le laboratoire où repose la dépouille de Nuncius.

languages.text: 启动那部旧电梯。这是到达努恩修斯遗体所在实验室的唯一途径。
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

traits.locale_text: 启动那部旧电梯。这是到达努恩修斯遗体所在实验室的唯一途径。

languages.text: Activa el viejo ascensor. Es la única forma de llegar al laboratorio donde reposa el cuerpo de Nuncius.
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

traits.locale_text: Activa el viejo ascensor. Es la única forma de llegar al laboratorio donde reposa el cuerpo de Nuncius.

languages.text: 古いリフトを作動させる。ヌンシウスの遺体が安置されている研究室に行くには、これしかない。
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

languages.text: Eski asansörü etkinleştir. Nuncius'un bedeninin bulunduğu laboratuvara ulaşmanın tek yolu bu.
languages.original_text: Activate the old lift. This is the only way to reach the laboratory where Nuncius's body rests.

traits.locale_text: Eski asansörü etkinleştir. Nuncius'un bedeninin bulunduğu laboratuvara ulaşmanın tek yolu bu.
